title: hariota alata
intro: Hariota alata, also known as the Asiatic dayflower or blue star creeper, is a type of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, which can help treat various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Hariota alata include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an antipyretic to lower body temperature. Hariota alata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
